reviews.text:
I had a very disappointing experience at The Birth Company under HCA Healthcare UK today (27Feb2025), specifically due to the unprofessional and rude behavior of Specialist Sonographer Afsaneh Tehrani. This was my first pregnancy, a deeply emotional and special moment, yet she treated me in an unwelcoming and dismissive manner.

When I asked if the sound we heard was my baby’s heartbeat, she responded in a condescending way: “Your heart is up there” (pointing at my chest), “that’s the baby’s heartbeat, yeah!” This was completely unnecessary and unprofessional. A first-time mother asking a simple question should never be made to feel belittled. On top of that, she didn’t even acknowledge my pregnancy with a simple “congratulations,” which is basic courtesy in any prenatal setting.

She was also clearly in a hurry, rushing through the appointment as if she just wanted to get it over with. At one point, she even asked if I had finished changing yet, making me feel pressured and uncomfortable instead of supported during such an important moment.

Additionally, she spoke very aggressively to my husband, telling him to only take pictures without her in the frame. While we understand staff may have preferences about photos, the way she communicated this was unnecessarily harsh and unpleasant, adding to the overall negative experience.

To be clear, the reception and administrative staff were kind and professional, and my issue is solely with Afsaneh Tehrani. I am well aware of the exceptional quality of care in HCA Healthcare, as I will be delivering at The Portland Hospital. Unfortunately, this experience fell far below those standards.

I strongly do not recommend Afsaneh Tehrani and hope The Birth Company ensures their patients receive the respect and compassion they deserve during such a sensitive and emotional time.

My husband and I went for an early reassurance scan here and it turned out to be nothing but. We found the sonographer to be quite rude, abrupt and her delivery of the results was very confusing. Leaving us worried with no further guidance …

Really disappointing experience at The Harley street clinic, where I felt totally misled.
Booked in for a follicle scan which is advertised online as being able to track …

We went to the Birth Company and unfortunately, there was something wrong  with the development. I went back a few days later, to confirm the miscarriage. At that appointment, I was asked the transfer date, while it was natural conception. …

My husband and I came to the clinic for my pregnancy anomaly scan. The sonographer was extremely unhelpful and was not in the least interested to answer our questions we had. In addition, we were treated with a very cold natured …

Not the kindest of people to go for a scan. I went for a early scan 7 weeks and was told by the sonographer that my baby would probably die before I go for my 12 week scan, despite me having an earlier NHS scan in the week at which I was …

I booked an ultrasound test and rang before the day to ask a few questions. The receptionist immediately asked me why I was coming without being referred by a GP and pressured me to cancel my appointment! Not happy about this as already worried about the scan and then to be spoken to in such a way was shocking appointment cancelled by force and no scan at the end of it
Was not a good experience for me.
Avoid ! I shall be raising a formal complaint .

ABSOLUTELY USELESS!!! They consistently make mistakes with their booking system. So you will turn up on time and there wont be anyone available to do your test. The staff are a disaster and totally unprofessional - Never coming back again

Dear Ananda, 

Thank you for taking the time to feedback to us. We are disappointed that we did not meet your expectations. We have contacted you directly and investigated your case. Whilst we strive to learn and improve, we cannot identify any error made on behalf of The Birth Company team on this occasion. Please contact us directly should you wish to discuss the matter further.

With best wishes, 

The Birth Company

I went for a Harmony test at exactly 10 weeks. Almost a week later I received a call saying that my results were inconclusive and they need to repeat the test. Went to give another sample, had another scan just to receive again the same no …

We are were not sure which NIPT to go for and a lovely receptionist told us to discuss with the technician. We found the technician to be rude and she also gave us incorrect information. During the scan my husband was taking a video of the screen on the wall (not neither I or the technician could possibly be included in the view) and we were told very rudely that she would rather that we do not record. We have been to other scanning centres and its never been an issue! As said we are just taking a video of the fetus and not anyone else or thr room! Also the same thing could have been conveyed in a polite manner. While explaining the difference between safe, panorama and harmony we were told the panorama results take 7-10 days. I queried this as the website says otherwise. However was told no its 7-10 so we went ahead with Panorama. We wanted the results before the NHS 12 weeks nuchal test and did not receive the results in the 7-10 days and before the NHS test. I would not use this place again. Maybe it was just our luck to get the wrong technician. 2 stars for the easy booking process and the receptionist.

I have done 7-8 scans here during my two pregnancies which all went fine. Easy booking, fast service, on time, pleasant staff. However, I had a senior sonographer appointment few weeks ago where I asked specifically for transvaginal scan which provides the most accurate picture for my state. She dismissed me by saying that she sees everything on the stomach scan. Few weeks later when I did transvaginal scan it turned out the things are very different. It is possible they may have changed in the meantime but also likely I wasn't checked well. I came specifically as NHS didn't want to do transvaginal at that point but being rejected at private clinic is a very poor practice.

Pro: Area clean and front desk staffs were friendly
Scan was quite detailed and the screen was huge !
Report came back quick.

Con: The sonographer wasn't too friendly and late for the appointment. She was so in a rush at the end to go on to her next appointment that she rushed to do my blood test and didn't do it properly. First time on my right arm wasn't successful she wiggled the needle inside my arm for awhile but still failed. She then needs to redo it on my left arm. ( I have been having blood test at the hospital numerous times in these past few weeks and is always a success). The wiggled she did on my right arm was a little discomfort. Both of my arms ended up bruised.

I called before and was told the sonographer will explain to me the difference between each NIPT package before making a choice. But because she was so in a rush, we didn't have a thorough explanation and had to make a decision in that second.

One other thing is for some reason people keep knocking on the door while I was having a scan and blood test which was quite disturbing.

We went for the Bronze Package that includes 3 scans . I must say we were very happy with the first 2 ladies that did our scans . They were super nice and caring , they would ask us if we wanted more photos or videos of the baby and they …
